description:
Track and evaluate the performance of your investment portfolio across stocks, cryptocurrencies, and other assets.


- New: Added Top Contributors dashboard widgets.
- New: Allow using different tickers for historical and latest quote feeds.
- New: Added Vivid value color scheme.
- New: Added backfill tool for ex-dates of existing dividend transactions.
- New: Added option to show the last transaction date in accounts and portfolios.
- New: Added FIRE (Financial Independence, Retire Early) calculation widget.
- New: Added PDF importers for Ayvens Bank and Tradegate (account statements).
- Improvement: Migrated Eurostat HICP feed to a new dataset.
- Improvement: Automatically look up ex-date during PDF import of new dividend transactions.
- Improvement: Enhanced PDF importers for Trade Republic, ING-DiBa, Scalable Capital, DKB, DZ Bank Gruppe, Gladbacher Bank AG, NIBC Bank, Raiffeisen Bankgruppe, S Broker, Santander Consumer Bank, DAB, and Deutsche Bank.
- Improvement: Made first treemap labels bold for better readability.
- Fix: Importer allows re-marking entries for import.
- Fix: Prevent detaching the portfolio window.
